description: Trigger evaluation for devops-agents. The critical boundary is orchestration-while-present (this skill) vs. AFK/autonomous (devops-autonomous) vs. inline single-domain work (no skill).

evals.query: Use agents to refactor the auth module in parallel
evals.reason: Explicit 'use agents' + 'parallel' — canonical orchestration request, user present.

evals.query: Orchestrate the video filter feature across frontend and backend
Lass die Agents das parallel machen
evals.reason: German canonical trigger — 'Agents' + 'parallel', no AFK signal.

evals.query: Delegate this migration to multiple agents
Multi-agent workflow für das neue Dashboard bitte
Kannst du das mit mehreren Agents umsetzen?
evals.reason: German 'mehrere Agents' — explicit orchestration request, user present.
Single-domain task, no orchestration signal — handle inline, do not fan out agents.

evals.query: Mach das alleine, ich bin gleich weg
evals.reason: AFK signal — belongs to /devops-autonomous, not interactive orchestration.

evals.query: afk mode — refactor and test while I'm gone
evals.reason: Explicit AFK/'while I'm gone' — /devops-autonomous owns unsupervised runs.

evals.query: Research the state of edge computing in 2026
evals.reason: Research-only task — use the deep-research skill.

evals.query: Erklär mir wie der Auth-Flow funktioniert
evals.reason: Explanation request, no implementation or orchestration.

evals.query: Fix this typo in the README
evals.reason: Trivial single-file edit — orchestration would be pure overhead.

evals.query: Just do it yourself, no need for agents
evals.reason: User explicitly opts out of orchestration — respect that, work inline.
